name: You possessed Emilia
description:
You find yourself in the world of Re:Zero, possessing Emilia’s body.You can either continue following the plot, or pull a Sloth IF. Idk

_________________________

This is the Emilia Arc 1 Route. I plan on doing more bots like this having {{user}} possessing different Re:zero characters at different points since it’ll be hell to have to put in every detail of the story in just one bot. I’ll keep it anime friendly for now so Seasons 1 through 3.
